name: oxgraph
description: Codebase dependency visualizer and call graph generator

scripts.clean: shx rm -rf packages/core/target packages/core/*.node packages/ui/dist packages/cli/public-ui packages/cli/dist
scripts.lint: pnpm run lint:core && pnpm run lint:ui && pnpm run lint:cli
scripts.test: pnpm run test:core && pnpm run test:ui && pnpm run test:cli
scripts.format: pnpm run format:core && pnpm run format:ui && pnpm run format:cli
scripts.build:ui: pnpm --filter @oxgraph/ui run build && pnpm run copy:ui
scripts.build: pnpm run build:core && pnpm run build:ui && pnpm run build:cli
scripts.copy:ui: shx rm -rf packages/cli/public-ui && shx cp -r packages/ui/dist packages/cli/public-ui
scripts.dev: pnpm run build:core && pnpm -r --parallel run dev
